text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Marvelous! ☆ Thank you so much for the wishes!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It appears birthdays are particularly special for
you, given your voice is somehow at an even
higher pitch.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you notice things like that about me? How
stupendously studious you are! Marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's the "marvelous" you say to Nature, the one
you give to praise someone.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And that's the "marvelous" you say when you're
struck by sudden surprise.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Now this is a first! What kind of meaning would
you say lies within that "marvelous"?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
It sprang up because we've grown closer
together—a brand-new marvelous! ☆

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Birthdays bring about all sorts of new marvelous
things. What a marvelous day!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
It seems I still need more time to understand...
but I'm very happy to know we've become closer.
